weather_daily.detailedForecast: A chance of rain before 10am. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 62. South wind 7 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

weather_daily.shortForecast: Light Rain Likely then Mostly Cloudy
weather_daily.detailedForecast: Rain likely before noon. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 55. Northwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

mbta_alerts.header: Jackson Square: The stairway connecting the Jackson Sq lobby and the south end of the platform is closed until winter 2026. Use the stairway at the north end of the platform. This closure is for the construction of a new stairway and a second elevator.
On Thursday, March 26, on the Providence/Stoughton Line will operate on a modified weekday schedule to support Friendly Match Foxboro Event Service.

On Monday, March 30, a construction schedule will go into effect on the Newburyport/Rockport Line. Between 9am and 3pm on weekdays, 4 inbound and 4 outbound trains will be temporarily suspended. Visit MBTA.com/CR for more information.
On the weekend of March 28-29, Greenbush Line service will terminate at Braintree. Passengers can u the Red Line for service between Braintree and South Station.
Green Line B Branch: Shuttle buses replace service between Kenmore and Boston College from April 22 - 30 due to infrastructure upgrades.

There is no accessible path connecting the inbound and outbound platforms at Wellesley Square Station. The existing path includes steep slopes and is long. Designs are underway to provide for a fully compliant pathway.
Red Line riders can expect longer travel times on the Ashmont Branch nightly from 8 PM, to end of service. This is to allow for critical signal work near JFK/UMass.

Green Line: Shuttle buses replace service between Copley and Boston College (B), St. Mary's (C), and Brookline Hills (D), the weekend of April 25 - 26 due to infrastructure upgrades. Riders downtown can use the Orange Line for alternate service.
On the weekend of March 28-29, Greenbush Line service will terminate at Braintree. Passengers can utilize Red Line for service between Braintree and South Station.
On March 20-22 & 27-29 and April 10-12 & 24-27, Orange Line will replace service on the Haverhill Line between North Station and Oak Grove.
Littleton/Route 495 passengers can expect occasional traffic and detours accessing the station due to the Foster Street reconstruction work.
On Thursday, March 26, the Franklin/Foxboro Line will operate on a modified weekday schedule to support Friendly Match Foxboro Event Service.
Please board all Rockport Line Trains on the outbound platform (Track 1) at Montserrat through Rockport until the end of service tonight.

On March 26, riders going to the Brazil vs. France match should be at South Station at the specified time for their boarding group: Group A at 12 PM and Group B at 12:30 PM. Train departure times are estimates and subject to change.
To accommodate Providence Station Renovations, construction barriers have been installed and the Southern stairwell to Track 1 is out of service. Staircase access to Track 3 and Track 5 are now open.
On the weekends of Friday, March 20-22 & Friday, March 27-29, shuttle buses will replace service on the Newburyport/Rockport Line between North Station and Swampscott.
On March 20-22 & 27-29 and April 10-12 & 24-27, Red Line and Green Line will replace train service on the Fitchburg Line between North Station and Porter.

Red Line riders can expect longer travel times nightly from 8 PM, to end of service. Beginning on March 26, regular service will operate between Braintree and JFK/UMass. For continued service, please transfer to an Alewife-Ashmont train at JFK/UMass.
Jackson Square: The platform is undergoing renovations to improve safety and accessibility. Sections of the platform are unlevel, which may make it difficult for some riders to board and exit trains.
On March 20-22 & 27-29 and April 10-12 & 24-27, shuttle buses will replace train service on the Lowell Line between North Station and Anderson/Woburn.
